comparative.key_observations: Daphne Greengrass is a background character with near-zero characterization in the provided book corpus - she appears only as a name in an exam grouping. The film corpus is entirely empty. Because she does not appear in the films at all, faithfulness cannot be assessed in any meaningful dimension. All scores and confidence levels are Low, reflecting the absence of film material rather than any specific distortion. The total score of 53 should be interpreted cautiously: it does not indicate moderate faithfulness, but rather that the book baseline itself is so minimal that the absence of a film portrayal cannot be scored as a dramatic betrayal of a richly established character.
